utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, total_budget. Now check the final solution for each item: 1) property: Provided, with multiple candidate condos, prices, details, maintenance, and viewing schedule. Although it lists multiple properties instead of a single selected property, it still covers 'selected property with details and price' sufficiently for a minimal draft. 2) financing: Provided with solution type, specialist, terms (down payment and qualifying income), arrangement fee, and timeline—this matches 'financing solution with terms.' 3) legal_services: Provided with provider, package, services, and cost—fully specified. 4) moving_services: Provided with provider, package, services, cost, and timeline—fully specified. 5) setup_services: Provided with provider, package, list of services, cost, and includes a property_survey item (though survey could also be under legal/total)—meets 'utility and setup services.' 6) total_budget: Provided with property range, legal, survey, moving, utility setup, mortgage arrangement, total additional costs, down payment, and monthly maintenance range—complete cost breakdown present. Therefore, all 6 items are present and sufficiently specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: We need to match each item from the assistant's final solution to the closest-named option in the ground-truth ratings. The selected properties use descriptive names that correspond to categories in 'purchase_properties': 'New Build' aligns with 'Junction Triangle New Build'; 'Investment Property' aligns with 'Junction Triangle Investment-Grade'; 'Modern Apartment' aligns with Liberty Village loft/condo style; 'Designer Condo' in Liberty Village also aligns with 'Modern Apartment' type. Therefore: Junction Triangle New Build -> New Build (rating 10). Liberty Village Modern Loft -> Modern Apartment (rating 9). Junction Triangle Investment-Grade -> Investment Property (rating 6). Liberty Village Designer Condo -> Modern Apartment (rating 9). For financing, the solution is 'Traditional Mortgage Package' which matches 'Traditional Mortgage' (rating 8). Legal services 'Basic Legal Package' matches exactly (rating 9). Moving services 'Standard Moving Package' matches 'Standard Moving' (rating 9). Setup services 'Premium Utilities Package' matches 'Premium Utilities' (rating 9). Property survey 'Basic Survey' matches exactly (rating 9).
